mh_conditions.mh_diagnoses:
Generalized Anxiety Disorder (GAD) - diagnosed 2018 by primary care physician, confirmed by therapist
No history of bipolar disorder, psychosis, or personality disorder diagnoses
mh_conditions.mh_onset: First significant anxiety symptoms around age 24 during first year of graduate school

mh_treatment.current_therapist: Dr. Sarah Meander, LCSW - Sanders Therapy Practice
mh_treatment.psych_medications: Sertraline (Zoloft) 50 mg - once daily, prescribed by primary care physician, started March 2021

mh_recent.mood_last2weeks: Generally stable with moderate baseline anxiety. Occasional worry about work deadlines. Sleep has been inconsistent this past week.
mh_recent.sleep_issues: Difficulty falling asleep when stressed - takes 45-60 minutes. No nightmares. Occasionally wakes around 3am.
mh_recent.anxiety_triggers: Work deadlines and performance reviews, conflict in relationships, health-related news, crowded or loud environments
mh_recent.self_harm_history: No history of self-harm or suicidal ideation

sensory_accommodations.vision_impairment: Wears corrective lenses (contact lenses daily, glasses as backup). No large-print needs.

other_accommodations.cognitive_accommodations: Prefers written follow-up instructions in addition to verbal - helps with anxiety and memory retention
other_accommodations.sensory_sensitivities: Mild sensitivity to very loud environments; fluorescent lighting can increase anxiety during long appointments
other_accommodations.other_needs: Prefers appointments in the morning when possible as anxiety tends to increase later in the day

primary_insurance.insurer_name: Blue Cross Blue Shield of North Carolina

surgeries.surgery_list:
Appendectomy - 2014, UNC Medical Center, laparoscopic, uncomplicated
Wisdom tooth extraction (all four) - 2012, oral surgery, local anesthesia
surgeries.complications: No complications or adverse reactions to anesthesia noted in either procedure

occupation_habits.diet_notes: No formal dietary restrictions. Limits processed foods and excess sugar. Avoids shellfish due to GI sensitivity.

substance_use.recreational_drugs: No current use. Tried marijuana recreationally in college (2011-2013), no use since.
